name: omarchy_faq
content:
F AQ 
How do I switch between keyboard ayouts? 
Edit your ~/.config/hypr/input.conf fie and add this to switch between ayouts on Left
Alt + Right Alt:
# Use multiple keyboard layouts and switch between them with Left Alt + Right Alt
input {
    kb_layout = us,fr
    kb_options = compose:caps,grp:alts_toggle
}
You can even configure Waybar to showing your current keyboard ayout in the top bar.
How do I change the cock format to 12-hour? 
Edit your ~/.config/waybar/config.jsonc fie and repace this:
  "clock": {
    "format": "{:%A %H:%M}",
with:
  "clock": {
    "format": "{:%A %I:%M %p}",
This wi dispay Sunday 1055 AM.
How do I change where screenshots or screenrecordings are saved? 
If you screenshots to be saved to ~/Pictures/Screenshots instead of just ~/Pictures ,
you can open Setup > Defauts via the Omarchy menu and set this:
export OMARCHY_SCREENSHOT_DIR="$HOME/Pictures/Screenshots"
You can do the same for screenrecordings using OMARCHY_SCREENRECORD_DIR.
Just remember to create the directoy you want to save to and restart Omarchy for this to
take effect.
FAQ · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/67/faq

take effect.
How do I get the speakers + webcam
working on my Appe Studio Dispay? 
You'd think that it shoud a work just pugging in USB C, but unfortunatey that isn't the
case. The soution I've found to make it work reiaby is using the WJESOG DispayPort +
USBA  USBC cabe. Then speakers and webcam work ike a charm.
Remember that you have buit-in brightness contro in Omarchy for the Appe Dispays
(both Studio and XDR) using Ctrl + F1  to turn down brightness, Ctrl + F2  to turn it up,
and Ctrl + Shift + F2 to set it to max.
How do I get rid of a the extra software? 
If you don't want programs ike Spotify or Obsidian or any of the other preinstaed stuff,
you can very easiy remove it.
Run Remove > Package to see every package that's instaed. Then you can seect any
package you'd ike to remove with tab, and start removing everything you've seected with
return.
And you can use Remove > Web App from the Omarchy menu to remove any of the
preinstaed web apps you don't want.
For errors and broken bits, see the Troubeshooting section.
FAQ · The Omarchy Manual · DHH https://learn.omacom.io/2/the-omarchy-manual/67/faq
